headline: OneMedNet, Onco-Innovations and Inka Health Announces Collaboration Aimed to Accelerate Potential for Oncology Drug Development Using Real-World Data and AI

headline: 10 ETFs investors should consider in Q2
summary: Equity exchange-traded fund (ETF) inflows saw a 9-month low in the first quarter.Strategas Securities chief ETF and technical strategist Todd Sohn paints a picture of the ETF trade right now, highlighting macro conditions affecting the market and outlining his expectations for the second quarter.

content.title: 10 ETFs investors should consider in Q2
content.description:
Equity exchange-traded fund (ETF) inflows saw a 9-month low in the first quarter.

Strategas Securities chief ETF and technical strategist Todd Sohn paints a picture of the ETF trade right now, highlighting macro conditions affecting the market and outlining his expectations for the second quarter.
